status: Family: {family}  SDK: {sdk}  Focus: {focus}  Transactions: {transactions}  Saved: {saved}  Window: {window_start}-{window_end}  History: {history}  Recording: {recording}  Input: {input}  Selected: {selected}  Uptime: {uptime}s

transactions.template: Keys: tab=focus  q=quit  {space}  c=clear  up/down=move transaction  page up/down=page  home/end=jump

keys.frequency: Keys: tab=focus  q=quit  space=toggle interface/code  c=clear  up/down=move frequency  page up/down=page  home/end=jump
keys.hexdump: Keys: tab=focus  q=quit  c=clear  up/down=scroll hexdump  page up/down=page  home/end=jump
keys.parsed: Keys: tab=focus  q=quit  c=clear  up/down=scroll parsed transaction  page up/down=page  home/end=jump
